prediction.reasoning: This prediction is a theoretical estimate for a 1-day horizon, assuming the current price ($513.05) as the neutral point estimate due to the very short timeframe and absence of specific predictive data. The confidence intervals are derived based on a general market assumption of daily price volatility (approximated from a typical annualized volatility for a large-cap stock like TMO, around 20%) and standard statistical methods (z-scores for a normal distribution of returns). It does not incorporate real-time market data, specific company news, technical analysis, or any fundamental factors, all of which can significantly influence actual stock movements. Therefore, actual prices may fall outside these predicted ranges.
